//RunVerificationHandler
using System.Diagnostics;
using IntegriteCBPFX.SharedKernel.Abstractions;
using IntegriteCBPFX.SharedKernel.Anomalies;
using IntegriteCBPFX.SharedKernel.Transactions;
using IntegriteCBPFX.SharedKernel.Verification;
using Microsoft.Extensions.Logging;

namespace IntegriteCBPFX.App.Features.Verification;

/// <summary>Mode d'exécution déterminant la plage de dates de trade à traiter.</summary>
public enum VerificationMode
{
    /// <summary>Veille : fromTradeDate = J-1, toTradeDate = jour courant.</summary>
    Veille,

    /// <summary>Journée courante : fromTradeDate = toTradeDate = jour courant.</summary>
    JourneeCourante,
}

/// <summary>Commande : lancer la vérification d'intégrité pour un mode donné.</summary>
/// <remarks>Un rejeu sur une date passée se fait en substituant l'horloge (<c>FixedDateClock</c>),
/// pas via cette commande : le jour « J » découle de <c>IClock</c>.</remarks>
public sealed record RunVerificationCommand(VerificationMode Mode);

/// <summary>Résultat synthétique du run, utilisé par le host pour le code de sortie.</summary>
public sealed record RunVerificationResult
{
    public required Guid RunId { get; init; }
    public required VerificationStatus Status { get; init; }
    public int CbpTransactionCount { get; init; }
    public int FxTransactionCount { get; init; }
    public int AnomalyCount { get; init; }
    public string? FailureReason { get; init; }

    public bool Succeeded => Status == VerificationStatus.Completed;
    public bool HasAnomalies => AnomalyCount > 0;

    public static RunVerificationResult FromRun(VerificationRun run) => new()
    {
        RunId = run.Id,
        Status = run.Status,
        CbpTransactionCount = run.CbpTransactionCount,
        FxTransactionCount = run.FxTransactionCount,
        AnomalyCount = run.AnomalyCount,
        FailureReason = run.FailureReason,
    };
}

/// <summary>
/// Use-case central : extrait CBP + FXSentry pour la plage du mode, délègue le
/// rapprochement au <see cref="VerificationEngine"/>, persiste, et notifie en cas d'anomalies.
/// </summary>
public sealed class RunVerificationHandler(
    ICbpTransactionSource cbpSource,
    IFxSentryTransactionSource fxSource,
    VerificationEngine engine,
    IVerificationStore store,
    INotifier notifier,
    IClock clock,
    ILogger<RunVerificationHandler> logger)
{
    public async Task<RunVerificationResult> HandleAsync(RunVerificationCommand command, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
    {
        ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(command);

        var today = DateOnly.FromDateTime(clock.Current.Date);
        var range = ResolveRange(command.Mode, today);

        var run = VerificationRun.Start(Guid.NewGuid(), range.ToTradeDate, clock.Current);
        var stopwatch = Stopwatch.StartNew();
        using var scope = logger.BeginScope("Run {RunId} - {Mode} [{From}..{To}]", run.Id, command.Mode, range.FromTradeDate, range.ToTradeDate);
        logger.LogInformation(
            "Démarrage de la vérification — mode {Mode}, tradeDate {From}..{To} (run {RunId}).",
            command.Mode, range.FromTradeDate, range.ToTradeDate, run.Id);

        IReadOnlyCollection<CbpTransaction> cbpTransactions;
        IReadOnlyCollection<FxSentryTransaction> fxTransactions;
        try
        {
            cbpTransactions = await cbpSource.GetTransactionsAsync(range, cancellationToken);
            logger.LogInformation("CBP : {Count} transaction(s) extraite(s).", cbpTransactions.Count);

            fxTransactions = await fxSource.GetTransactionsAsync(range, cancellationToken);
            logger.LogInformation("FXSentry : {Count} transaction(s) extraite(s).", fxTransactions.Count);
        }
        catch (TransactionSourceUnavailableException ex)
        {
            run.Fail(clock.Current, $"Source {ex.FailedSource} indisponible : {ex.Message}");
            await store.SaveRunAsync(run, cancellationToken);
            logger.LogError(ex, "Source {Source} indisponible — run {RunId} en échec après {Elapsed}.", ex.FailedSource, run.Id, stopwatch.Elapsed);
            return RunVerificationResult.FromRun(run);
        }

        var anomalies = engine.Verify(cbpTransactions, fxTransactions, clock.Current);

        logger.LogInformation(
            "Rapprochement : {Total} anomalie(s) — Tx CBP absentes FX={CbpMissing}, Tx FX absentes CBP={FxMissing}, écarts champs={FieldDiffs}.",
            anomalies.Count,
            anomalies.Count(a => a.CodeErreur == AnomalyCode.CbpNotInFxSentry),
            anomalies.Count(a => a.CodeErreur == AnomalyCode.FxSentryNotInCbp),
            anomalies.Count(a => a.CodeErreur == AnomalyCode.FieldDifferences));

        LogTopFieldsInError(anomalies);

        await store.AddAnomaliesAsync(anomalies, cancellationToken);
        run.Complete(clock.Current, cbpTransactions.Count, fxTransactions.Count, anomalies.Count);
        await store.SaveRunAsync(run, cancellationToken);

        if (anomalies.Count > 0)
        {
            await notifier.NotifyAsync(run, cancellationToken);
            logger.LogInformation("Back-Office notifié ({Count} anomalie(s)).", anomalies.Count);
        }

        logger.LogInformation(
            "Vérification terminée — statut {Status}, {AnomalyCount} anomalie(s), durée {Elapsed}.",
            run.Status, anomalies.Count, stopwatch.Elapsed);

        return RunVerificationResult.FromRun(run);
    }

    /// <summary>Journalise les 5 champs les plus fréquemment en écart (anomalies de code 3).</summary>
    private void LogTopFieldsInError(IReadOnlyList<AnomalyTransaction> anomalies)
    {
        var topFields = TopFieldsInError(anomalies);
        if (topFields.Count > 0)
        {
            logger.LogInformation("Top champs en écart : {TopFields}.", string.Join(", ", topFields));
        }
    }

    /// <summary>
    /// Les (au plus) 5 champs les plus fréquemment en écart parmi les anomalies de code 3,
    /// au format « champ=compte », triés par compte décroissant puis nom (ordinal).
    /// </summary>
    public static IReadOnlyList<string> TopFieldsInError(IReadOnlyList<AnomalyTransaction> anomalies)
    {
        ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(anomalies);
        return anomalies
            .Where(a => a.CodeErreur == AnomalyCode.FieldDifferences && a.ChampsErreurs is not null)
            .SelectMany(a => a.ChampsErreurs!.Split(AnomalyTransaction.SeparateurChamps, StringSplitOptions.RemoveEmptyEntries | StringSplitOptions.TrimEntries))
            .GroupBy(field => field, StringComparer.Ordinal)
            .OrderByDescending(group => group.Count())
            .ThenBy(group => group.Key, StringComparer.Ordinal)
            .Take(5)
            .Select(group => $"{group.Key}={group.Count()}")
            .ToArray();
    }

    /// <summary>Résout la plage de dates de trade selon le mode.</summary>
    public static VerificationDateRange ResolveRange(VerificationMode mode, DateOnly today) => mode switch
    {
        VerificationMode.Veille => new VerificationDateRange(today.AddDays(-1), today),
        VerificationMode.JourneeCourante => new VerificationDateRange(today, today),
        _ => throw new ArgumentOutOfRangeException(nameof(mode)),
    };
}

//end RunVerificationHandler


//
